log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Githzerai — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 9 falling damage. HP: 169/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Githzerai — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 163/178
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Githzerai — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Githzerai — Bardic Musician HP: 47/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Githzerai — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Githzerai — Bardic Musician HP: 22/67
→ Githzerai — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 11 vs DC 12]
Young Red Dragon attacks Githzerai — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Githzerai — Bardic Musician HP: 6/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Githzerai — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Githzerai — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Githzerai — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Githzerai — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Githzerai — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 10 vs DC 11]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
